overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a gothic horror game (resembling Bloodborne), showing a character in a dark coat and tricorn hat exploring a cathedral-like interior with distinctive green stained glass ceilings. The character moves through grand halls, corridors, and a side bedroom with canopy bed, showcasing detailed stone architecture and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic grand hall with stone fireplace and seating areas

events.description: character crouches briefly near a stone wall with light patterns
approaches the arched entrance leading to the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand hall, briefly crouching near a wall, then heading toward the corridor entrance

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with decorative mantel and warm fire glow
large potted fern in a stone planter
ornate wall-mounted lantern casting warm light
tall gothic archway leading to a corridor with green light

segments.scene_description: The character explores a spacious gothic grand hall featuring a large stone fireplace, potted ferns, and ornate wall sconces. After briefly crouching near a wall, the character walks across the patterned marble floor toward an arched corridor entrance emitting an eerie green glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with green stained glass ceiling

events.description: enters the corridor with distinctive green stained glass ceiling
finishes ascending the staircase and continues walking on flat ground

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone stairs and proceeding through the long corridor beneath the green stained glass ceiling

entered.detail: arched ceiling made of green stained glass panels emitting ethereal light
decorative iron railings lining the staircase and walkway
stone staircase leading upward into the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow gothic corridor dominated by a magnificent green stained glass ceiling that bathes the space in ethereal light. After ascending a short flight of stone stairs with ornate metal railings, the character continues through the long passageway with patterned tile floors and warm wall sconces.

scene_state.functional_zone: private bedroom with canopy bed and antique furniture

events.description: opens wooden door and enters the side bedroom
turns around near the canopy bed to exit the room

agents.ego_description: entering the side bedroom, walking around the canopy bed to explore the space, then turning back toward the door

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with decorative glass panels and metal studs
four-poster bed with dark wood frame and green fabric canopy
large ornate metal birdcage on a stand

segments.scene_description: The character opens a heavy wooden door and enters a private bedroom featuring a four-poster canopy bed with green drapes, a decorative birdcage, and antique furniture. After briefly exploring the room and walking around the bed, the character turns to exit back to the main corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with green stained glass ceiling

events.description: exits the bedroom and returns to the main corridor
camera tilts upward to look at the detailed stained glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: returning to the main corridor and continuing forward, looking up at the intricate green stained glass ceiling

entered.detail: arched ceiling made of green stained glass panels with intricate patterns
round stained glass window in the ceiling with blue and green tones

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bedroom and returns to the green-lit corridor, continuing the exploration. The camera tilts upward to admire the intricate patterns of the stained glass ceiling and a circular skylight as the character proceeds deeper into the gothic passageway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a spacious gothic hall into a luminous corridor and a private chamber before returning to the ethereal passageway. It begins with the character navigating a grand hall filled with potted ferns and a large stone fireplace, moving across patterned marble floors toward an arched entrance emitting an eerie green glow. As the character enters the narrow corridor, the environment shifts into a space bathed in emerald light from a magnificent stained glass ceiling, leading the camera up stone stairs and along a long, tiled passageway. The scene then transitions through a heavy wooden door into a private bedroom featuring a four-poster canopy bed with green drapes and antique furniture, before the character turns to exit the room. Finally, the camera returns to the green-lit corridor and tilts upward to admire the intricate patterns of the stained glass and a circular skylight as the character proceeds deeper into the gothic architecture.
